subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Praise be to God that thou hast rent asunder the veils and cast off all restraint [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی حمد کن خدا را که هتک استار نمودی و خلع عذار کردی و باسرار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @poems and quotation from poetry, @mystical themes, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
